quotes: Apply the palette in the **primary > secondary > tertiary ratio** shown in the guide
Apply the palette in the **primary > secondary > tertiary ratio** shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.

rules.intent: Maintain the intended hierarchy and visual dominance of the core brand palette.
rules.rule_text: Apply the palette according to the primary > secondary > tertiary hierarchy: blues and golds dominate, while tertiary colors serve as accents and surfaces.

quotes: **Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
**Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds (with increased line height, §1.2).
**Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
**Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds (with increased line height, §1.2).

rules.intent: Preserve readable, consistent text contrast across light, dark, and gradient surfaces.
rules.rule_text: Headings use the responsive heading color treatment (heading.color = Brand Blue #00529b, switching to White #ffffff on dark or gradient backgrounds). Body text uses the responsive body color treatment (body.color = Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds and White #ffffff on dark backgrounds); body copy on dark backgrounds also uses the increased line-height treatment specified by body.line_height.

quotes: Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; **Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures**; gray for placebo.
**Charts/about:blank** Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; **Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures**; gray for placebo.

rules.intent: Create a consistent chart hierarchy while reserving warm colors for the most important figures.
rules.rule_text: Charts use the chart data color roles (chart.data.color = Brand Blue #00529b and Sky Blue #358CCB as dominant colors, Sunshine #faa31b or Gold #ffc60a only to emphasize key figures, and gray for placebo). Sunshine and Gold are strictly reserved for key-figure emphasis.

quotes: **Callout surfaces:** Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).
**Callout surfaces:** Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).

rules.intent: Differentiate data and text-heavy callouts through their approved surface treatments.
rules.rule_text: Data callouts use the secondary callout fill (callout.secondary.fill = Light Blue #E6F0F9 at 70% tint), while text-heavy callouts use the text-heavy callout fill (callout.text_heavy.fill = Golden Sand #FEF1C8 at 30% tint).

quotes: **Coral:** sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data.
**Coral:** sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. **[GENERAL]:** avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.

rules.intent: Prevent Coral from competing with core brand colors or carrying primary and data-driven meaning.
rules.rule_text: Coral #F26A38 is reserved for sparing tertiary accents and must never be used for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. Avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief specifically calls for it.

quotes: **Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.
**Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.

rules.intent: Keep links recognizable and legible across contrasting backgrounds.
rules.rule_text: Links use the responsive link color treatment (body.link.color = Brand Blue #00529b on light backgrounds and White #ffffff on dark backgrounds) and remain underlined (body.link.decoration = underline).

quotes: The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances**
The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

rules.intent: Preserve the approved visual treatment of the logo icon wherever the mark is reproduced.
rules.rule_text: Maintain the logo icon and any pattern or graphic made from the mark at 70% transparency using Pantone 7548 C / Gold #ffc60a in every instance.
